title: dieteria shastensis
intro: Dieteria shastensis, also known as Shasta dieteria or Shasta daisy of the west, is a rare and endangered annual plant species that belongs to the sunflower family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Dieteria shastensis has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
